title: Baked Pumpkin Slices
excerpt: Ingredients a quarter of a pumpkin or more, skin and all, cut into thick slices 250 ml good sweet wine salt to taste 2 cinnamon sticks, broken up a bit a handful of thyme and rosemary sprigs honey to taste Method Arrange the pumpkin slices in an oven dish and pour the sweet wine over. Season with salt and press …
html:
Ingredients

  • a quarter of a pumpkin or more, skin and all, cut into thick slices
  • 250 ml good sweet wine salt to taste
  • 2 cinnamon sticks, broken up a bit
  • a good handful of thyme and rosemary sprigs
  • honey to taste

Method

Arrange the pumpkin slices in an oven dish and pour the sweet wine over.

Season with salt and tuck the cinnamon pieces and herb sprigs in here and there among the pumpkin slices.

Drizzle with honey, cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes at 200°C.

Remove the foil and bake further until all the pan juices are syrupy and the pumpkin slices are soft and browned.

Serves 4 – 6.

Easy!
